landing.cta.subtitle: Start using Transi-Store for free today.

landing.features.ai.description: Get translation suggestions powered by AI to speed up your workflow.
landing.features.ai.title: AI-powered Translation
landing.features.api.description: Programmatic access with API keys for seamless CI/CD integration.
landing.features.api.title: API & CI/CD Integration
landing.features.documents.description: Translate Markdown and MDX documents side-by-side with structural section alignment, AI-assisted translation, and fuzzy tracking — purpose-built for developer documentation.
landing.features.documents.title: Document Translation
landing.features.export.description: Export translations in multiple industry-standard formats including JSON, XLIFF, YAML, CSV, Gettext PO, INI and PHP.
landing.features.export.title: Multi-format Export
landing.features.multiLang.description: Manage translations in unlimited languages with full ICU message support.
landing.features.multiLang.title: Multi-language Support
landing.features.multiProject.descriptio: Organize your translations across multiple projects within your organization.
landing.features.multiProject.title: Multi-project Management
landing.features.strings.description: Translate key/value strings with full ICU message format support — plurals, selects, variables, and ordinals — for dynamic, locale-aware UI copy.
landing.features.strings.title: String Translation & ICU
landing.features.subtitle: Everything you need to manage translations efficiently.
landing.features.team.description: Invite team members, manage roles and collaborate on translations.
landing.features.team.title: Team Collaboration
landing.features.title: Key Features
landing.hero.subtitle: The open-source, multi-project translation management tool for teams. Organize, translate, and export — all in one place.
landing.hero.title: Manage your translations, simply.
